title: SAP integration
excerpt: Has anybody successfully integrated SAP and Monday.com? Would like to hear some feedback.

posts.cookedHtml: Has anybody successfully integrated SAP and Monday.com? Would like to hear some feedback.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @MMpro and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I can not say I have integrated SAP and monday but if you have any specific technical questions, you can always reach out to our technical support team here
